title: Delonix decaryi
taxonomy: Delonix decaryi is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. It is a type of tree that is native to Madagascar and is also known as the 'Flamboyant Tree' due to its vibrant red flowers. This plant is part of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae, which is a large group of flowering plants. Delonix decaryi is often classified as being in the genus Delonix, which consists of several species of trees and shrubs. The classification of Delonix decaryi is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its distinctive flowers and large, compound leaves.
